title: carex × suziella
intro: Carex × suziella, also known as Carex 'Suziella', is a hybrid sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Carex × suziella include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carex × suziella include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
